title: SYSTEMS AND METHODS FOR USING ADVERBS FOR IMPROVED CREATION OF EXTENDED REALITY WORLDS, EXPERIENCES, SIMULATIONS AND LEARNING ACTIVITIES
summary:
Attorney Docket No. 114784-827872
AMENDMENTS TO THE ABSTRACT
Please replace the Abstract with the following NEW Abstract:

A user with an extended reality hardware device creates and changes appearance of a digital object in extended reality environments by using voice commands including adverbs in conjunction with pointing action of a hand at location point. A representation of the digital object is retrieved for display at the location point pointed to by the user.
-3-
details:
This listing of claims will replace all prior versions, and listings, of claims in the application.
Listing of the Claims:

1
1. (Currently Amended) A method for generating a digital object in an extended reality environment comprising:detecting a voice command from a user using an extended reality environment via an extended reality hardware device, wherein the voice command requests creation of a digital object for display in the extended reality environment, and wherein the voice command includes an adverb of place indicating a location for creation of the digital object;
detecting a pointing action from a hand of the user to a location point in the extended reality environment via the extended reality hardware device;
retrieving a representation of the digital object for displaying creating the digital object at the location point; and
displaying creating the representation of the digital object at the location point in the extended reality environment via the extended reality hardware device in response to both the detecting of the voice command and the pointing action from the user.

Currently amended

2
2. (Original) The method of claim 1, 
wherein the extended reality environment is an augmented reality environment.
Original

3
3. (Original) The method of claim 1, 
wherein the extended reality environment is a virtual reality environment.
Original

4
4. (Original) The method of claim 3, 
further comprising retrieving multiple different representations of the digital object and receiving selection of the representation of the digital object to display at the location point from the user.

Original

5
5. (Original) The method of claim 3, 
wherein the location point is a vector with coordinates in the virtual reality environment.
Original

6
6. (Original) The method of claim 1, 
further comprising retrieving multiple different representations of the digital object and receiving selection of the representation of the digital object to display at the location point from the user.
Original

7
7. (Original) The method of claim 1, 
wherein the location point is a vector with coordinates in the extended reality environment.
Original

8
8. (Original) The method of claim 7, 
wherein the location point from the pointing action of the user intersects an extended reality boundary of an existing extended reality object and the digital object is displayed on or interacting with the existing extended reality object.
Original

9
9. (Original) The method of claim 7, 
wherein the location point from the pointing action of the user intersects a wall or floor of the extended reality environment.
Original

10
10. (Original) The method of claim 2, 
wherein the location point from the pointing action of the user intersects a wall or floor of the extended reality environment.
Original

11
11. (Original) The method of claim 2, 
wherein the location point from the pointing action of the user intersects an extended reality boundary of an existing extended reality object and the digital object is displayed on or interacting with the existing extended reality object.
Original

12
12. (Original) The method of claim 6, 
further comprising:
receiving spoken instructions from the user via the extended reality hardware device that the digital object should include one or more visual attributes; and
modifying the representation of the digital object via the extended reality hardware device in the extended reality environment as including the one or more visual attributes.

Original

13
13. (Original) The method of claim 12, 
wherein the one or more visual attributes are selected from a group including: type, color, size, volume, height, width, length, movement, speed, texture, location of components of the digital object and combinations thereof.

Original

14
14. (Original) The method of claim 1, 
further comprising:receiving spoken instructions from the user via the extended reality hardware device that the digital object should include one or more visual attributes; and
modifying the representation of the digital object via the extended reality hardware device in the extended reality environment as including the one or more visual attributes.

Original

15
15. (Original) The method of claim 14, 
wherein the one or more visual attributes are selected from the group including: type, color, size, height, volume, width, length, movement, speed, texture, location of components of the digital object and combinations thereof.
Original

16
16. (Original) The method of claim 1, 
further comprising:receiving a size gesture detected from one or more hands of the user via the extended reality hardware device that the digital object should be represented according to the size gesture; and
displaying the representation of the digital object via the extended reality hardware device in the extended reality environment as including a size in accordance with the size gesture.

Original

17
17. (Original) The method of claim 16, 
wherein the size gesture is received from detection of both hands of the user via the extended reality hardware device.
Original

18
18. (Original) The method of claim 14, 
wherein the location point is a vector with coordinates in the extended reality environment.

Original
